topic.ja: ともだちに　プレゼントを　あげる
topic.en: Giving a present to a friend
topic.fr: Offrir un cadeau à un ami
topic.es: Dar un regalo a un amigo

ja.intro: ともだちに　プレゼントを　あげます。なんといいますか。
ja.question: ともだちに　なんといいますか。

en.intro: You are giving your friend a present. What do you say?

options.text: Here you go / Please take this.
How was this? / What happened with this?

en.question: What do you say to your friend?

de.intro: Sie geben Ihrem Freund ein Geschenk. Was sagen Sie?

options.text: Wie war das? / Was ist damit passiert?

de.question: Was sagen Sie zu Ihrem Freund?

fr.intro: Vous offrez un cadeau à votre ami. Que dites-vous?
fr.question: Que dites-vous à votre ami?

es.intro: Le estás dando un regalo a tu amigo. ¿Qué dices?
es.question: ¿Qué le dices a tu amigo?

meanings.tr: buyurun / alın / lütfen (bir şey verirken ya da teklif ederken söylenir)
meanings.en: here you go / please (said when offering or giving something)
meanings.de: bitte sehr / hier (gesagt beim Anbieten oder Geben von etwas)
meanings.fr: tenez / je vous en prie (dit en offrant ou donnant quelque chose)
meanings.es: toma / aquí tienes (dicho al ofrecer o dar algo)
meanings.ko: 자, 받으세요 (무언가를 주거나 권할 때 하는 말)

meanings.tr: teşekkürler / sağ ol (gayri resmi teşekkür — veren değil, alan kişi söyler)
meanings.en: thanks (informal gratitude — said by the receiver, not the giver)
meanings.de: danke (informeller Dank — gesagt vom Empfänger, nicht vom Geber)
meanings.fr: merci (gratitude informelle — dit par celui qui reçoit, pas celui qui donne)
meanings.es: gracias (gratitud informal — dicho por quien recibe, no por quien da)
meanings.ko: 고마워요 (비공식 감사 표현 — 받는 사람이 하는 말, 주는 사람이 아님)

meanings.tr: Bir şeyi verirken söylenen kısa ve nazik kalıp. 'Al bakalım / Buyur' anlamında.
meanings.en: Short polite phrase said when handing something over. Means 'here you go'.
meanings.de: Kurze höfliche Aussage beim Überreichen von etwas. Bedeutet 'bitte sehr'.
meanings.fr: Expression courte et polie en tendant quelque chose. Signifie 'tenez'.
meanings.es: Frase corta y cortés al entregar algo. Significa 'toma / aquí tienes'.
meanings.ko: 무언가를 건넬 때 쓰는 짧고 정중한 표현. '자, 받으세요' 의미.

logic.tr: Ok karakteri arkadaşına hediye veren kişidir. '1. これ、どうぞ' (Buyurun / Al bakalım.) doğrudur — bir şey verirken kullanılan standart, kibar ifadedir. Seçenek 2 'これ、どうも' teşekkür ifadesidir; veren değil, alan kişi söyler (Rol Karışıklığı). Seçenek 3 'これ、どうでしたか' 'bu nasıldı?' anlamında bir sorudur; hediye verirken kullanılmaz (Bağlam Karışıklığı).
logic.en: The arrow character is giving a present to a friend. '1. これ、どうぞ' is correct — said when handing something over. Option 2 'これ、どうも' is a thank-you — said by the receiver, not the giver (Role Confusion). Option 3 'これ、どうでしたか' means 'how was this?' — not used when giving a gift (Context Confusion).
logic.de: '1. これ、どうぞ' ist korrekt. Option 2 'これ、どうも' ist ein Dank — gesagt vom Empfänger (Rollenverwechslung). Option 3 'これ、どうでしたか' bedeutet 'wie war das?' (Kontextverwechslung).
logic.fr: '1. これ、どうぞ' est correct. L'option 2 'これ、どうも' est un remerciement — dit par celui qui reçoit (confusion de rôles). L'option 3 'これ、どうでしたか' signifie 'comment était-ce?' (confusion de contexte).
logic.es: '1. これ、どうぞ' es correcto. La opción 2 'これ、どうも' es un agradecimiento — dicho por quien recibe (confusión de roles). La opción 3 'これ、どうでしたか' significa '¿cómo estuvo?' (confusión de contexto).
logic.ko: '1. これ、どうぞ'가 정답입니다. 선택지 2 'これ、どうも'는 감사 표현으로 받는 사람이 하는 말입니다(역할 혼동). 선택지 3 'これ、どうでしたか'는 '이게 어떠셨어요?'라는 질문으로 선물을 줄 때 쓸 수 없습니다(상황 혼동).

image_prompt: Simple manga-style line drawing, black and white. A young woman with simple round head holds a wrapped gift box with a ribbon in both hands, arms extended forward, offering it to a young man on the RIGHT. The man with simple round head has both hands open to receive the gift, smiling with a happy surprised expression. Cartoon style with simple round faces, clean outlines, white background, no shading, no color, no text, no arrows. Same style as JLPT N5 textbook manga illustrations.
